docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NIKOLOVA, KATERINA NIKOLAEVA AS TO DEFENDANT INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO 207 CORP. AGENT FOR SERVICE INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORP, RETURNED TO COURT MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-11-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-07-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 10:00 A.M. ON 6/7/06 PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-20-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 7/20/06 10:00 A.M. TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIKOLOVA, KATERINA NIKOLAEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT - INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION. MOVED, NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
